# Project roadmap

**Project:** Example App

**Purpose:** Resumable setup and foundation work after the root README exists. Task checklists live in [`backlog.md`](./backlog.md). This folder is for **planning**, not product documentation (guides and conventions belong elsewhere under `docs/`).

**Handoff status:** In progress — see open items in `backlog.md` marked **required for handoff**. Criteria: Jarvis [`target-roadmap/handoff.md`](../../target-roadmap/handoff.md) (vendored copy optional after init).

**Task IDs:** `PROJ-*` (project roadmap). Not `JR-*` (Jarvis platform) and not product feature ticket IDs.
